all.en: Customer retention is one of the most important growth levers we have.
all.zh: 客戶留存是我們最重要的成長槓桿之一。

all.en: Retaining existing customers is far cheaper than acquiring new ones.
all.zh: 留住既有客戶比獲取新客戶便宜許多。

all.en: A small lift in retention can dramatically improve lifetime value.
all.zh: 留存率小幅提升可大幅改善客戶終身價值。

all.en: Our retention strategy is built on four core pillars this year.
all.zh: 我們今年的留存策略建立於四大核心支柱之上。

all.en: The first pillar is proactive customer success engagement.
all.zh: 第一支柱為主動的客戶成功互動。

all.en: Success managers conduct quarterly business reviews with each account.
all.zh: 客戶成功經理與每個客戶進行季度業務檢討。

all.en: These reviews highlight adoption progress and unrealized value.
all.zh: 檢討會凸顯採用進展與尚未實現的價值。

all.en: The second pillar focuses on product adoption and feature usage.
all.zh: 第二支柱聚焦於產品採用與功能使用。

all.en: Usage telemetry helps identify accounts at risk of churn early.
all.zh: 使用數據協助及早識別有流失風險的客戶。

all.en: Low engagement triggers automated outreach from success teams.
all.zh: 低度參與將觸發成功團隊的自動化聯繫。

all.en: The third pillar emphasizes executive sponsorship at strategic accounts.
all.zh: 第三支柱強調策略客戶的高層贊助。

all.en: Executive sponsors meet customer leaders at least twice per year.
all.zh: 高層贊助人每年至少與客戶領導者會面兩次。

all.en: These meetings strengthen relationships and surface emerging needs.
all.zh: 這些會議鞏固關係並浮現新興需求。

all.en: The fourth pillar covers continuous education and community programs.
all.zh: 第四支柱涵蓋持續教育與社群計畫。

all.en: Webinars, certifications, and user groups deepen customer skills.
all.zh: 網路研討會、認證與使用者社群深化客戶技能。

all.en: Engaged users typically renew at much higher rates than passive ones.
all.zh: 積極參與的使用者通常以遠高於被動使用者的比率續約。

all.en: Our renewals team forecasts every account ninety days in advance.
all.zh: 我們的續約團隊提前九十天預測每個客戶。

all.en: Risk accounts are flagged red and assigned a save plan owner.
all.zh: 風險客戶標記為紅色並指派挽救計畫負責人。

all.en: Save plans include tailored offers, training, and executive outreach.
all.zh: 挽救計畫包含客製化優惠、訓練與高層聯繫。

all.en: Voice of customer surveys are sent after major service interactions.
all.zh: 客戶心聲調查於重大服務互動後寄送。

all.en: Net promoter score is reviewed monthly by senior leadership.
all.zh: 淨推薦分數每月由高階管理層檢視。

all.en: Detractor feedback feeds directly into product and operations planning.
all.zh: 貶低者回饋直接導入產品與營運規劃。

all.en: Our target this year is gross retention above ninety four percent.
all.zh: 我們今年目標為毛留存率高於百分之九十四。

all.en: Achieving that goal will require coordinated effort across every team.
all.zh: 達成該目標需各團隊協調合作。
